news.title: President pays tribute to July Martyrs, urges unity to build martyrs' envisioned Bangladesh
news.snippet: President said the July Mass Uprising was an outburst of the people's long-standing anger against discrimination, corruption, enforced disappearances, killings, deprivation of voting rights, repression and fascist misrule.

news.title: Today marks historic July Martyrs’ Day
news.snippet: On this day in 2024, at least six people were killed during the anti-fascist movement.

news.title: Eight days of rain damages 197km of Ctg roads, surpassing six years’ monsoon toll
news.snippet: Chattogram received 1,354mm of rainfall between 6am on 5 July and 3pm on 12 July. Of that, 412mm fell in the 24 hours ending 3pm on 7 July – the city’s highest daily rainfall in 43 years.

news.title: No scope for Hasina to appeal; verdict must be enforced upon return: Nahid
news.snippet: Nahid Islam says authorities should arrest Sheikh Hasina upon her return to Bangladesh and enforce the court's verdict in accordance with the law.

news.title: Bangladesh risks falling behind without urgent action on AI and automation, experts warn
news.snippet: Experts warn that weak policy implementation, inadequate skills development and limited social protection could leave millions of workers vulnerable as automation reshapes the labour market.

news.title: The man who taught me to love football
